Prior Motorized Wheelchair Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates the resident's use of a motorized wheelchair prior to the current illness, exacerbation, or injury. effective 10/01/2018
707 GG0110C_PRIOR_MCHNCL_LIFT_IND GG0110C_PRIOR_MCHNCL_LIFT_IND GG0110C Prior Mechaniccl Lift Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates the resident's use of a mechanical lift prior to the current illness, exacerbation, or injury. effective 10/01/2018
708 GG0110D_PRIOR_WLKR_IND GG0110D_PRIOR_WLKR_IND GG0110D Prior Walker Indicator CHAR 1
